description_long: This modern two-story house features a flat roof and a light stone exterior, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with several small trees. The front facade is dominated by large floor-to-ceiling windows and a balcony with a blue glass railing, providing ample natural light to the interior. The backyard includes a rectangular swimming pool with a ladder, a poolside lounge area with sunbeds, and a large patio umbrella for shade. The house has multiple entry points, including a main entrance with steps and a small porch, as well as sliding glass doors leading to the pool area. The windows are arranged asymmetrically, with some smaller windows on the sides and larger ones facing the pool. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and open outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and a backyard pool surrounded by a stone fence and landscaped trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony with blue glass railing, large windows, and landscaped trees along the fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the solid stone wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the fence and trees.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the pool, patio area with umbrella and sunbeds, and the asymmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Backyard view focusing on the pool, patio furniture, large glass doors, and the open outdoor living space.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and smaller side windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, small porch, and a simple modern door flanked by large windows
